design_rationale: Deep navy/near-black background (#050816) combined with vibrant orange (#ff6b00) establishes an industrial, high-tech manufacturing vibe. Glassmorphism is used sparingly for premium emphasis (hero cards, mega menu, stat cards).

headings.usage: Use for all H1, H2, H3, major stat figures. Must use tracking-tight.

body.usage: Use for all paragraphs, labels, and small text. High legibility.

navigation.layout: Sticky glassmorphism header (z-50, backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#050816]/70, border-b border-white/10).

hero.layout: Grid 12-col. Left 7-cols for Headings + Stats. Right 5-cols for Glassmorphic Quick Enquiry Form. Overlay bg-[#050816]/60 on background image.

industries_preview.layout: Bento Grid (Control Room Mode). 4 Columns. Hover reveals image background + detail text.

featured_products.layout: Full width section with Swiper slider. Cards have dark glass background.

process_timeline.layout: Vertical staggered timeline with active state glow.

product_details.layout: 2-Column Layout. Left: Sticky vertical thumbnail gallery + main image + lightbox zoom. Right: Title, Specs, Features, Sticky Enquiry Form.

infrastructure.layout: Masonry grid for factory images, large video modal trigger, wide stats bento boxes.

gallery.layout: Masonry Layout with categorical filter buttons (All, Pouches, Rolls, Facility). Lightbox integration.

quote.layout: Centered multi-step form inside a large glassmorphic container. Progress bar at top. Validated inputs. Success modal overlay.

footer.layout: Premium multi-column dark footer. py-24. Large 'Lombodaran' brand text at bottom.

testing.data_testid_rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case role-based (e.g., data-testid='quick-enquiry-submit-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the UI entirely in React + Tailwind CSS (.js files, not .tsx).
Use framer-motion for page transitions, timeline animations, and section reveal effects.
Use Swiper for the Featured Products carousel, Product Detail gallery, and any other sliders.
Use shadcn/ui components but customize standard styling to match the provided dark glassmorphism theme (remove default border-radius, use transparent/glass backgrounds).
Setup routing (react-router-dom) for Home, Products, Product Details, Industries, Infrastructure, Quality Assurance, Gallery, About, Contact, and Get Quote.
Do NOT use placeholder images - strictly use the media_urls provided.
Mega Menu should be built using Radix UI or shadcn Navigation Menu with glassmorphic dropdowns.
Ensure the hero background image has a dark overlay (bg-[#050816]/60) so text and form are legible.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, inputs, links, forms, and major containers.
